channel.title: MAUI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MAUI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: CoreCLR Progress and the Mono Timeline for .NET MAUI
item.description:
.NET MAUI mobile apps now use CoreCLR as the only runtime in .NET 11 Preview 6. The post says the team is at this transition point and asks developers to test the change now.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 6 is now available!
item.description:
The post announces .NET 11 Preview 6 and says it includes updates across runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, F#, and container images. No specific feature details are included in the provided text.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET MAUI Moves to CoreCLR in .NET 11
item.description:
In .NET 11, .NET MAUI apps on Android, iOS, and Mac Catalyst run on CoreCLR by default. This aligns MAUI with the same runtime used across the rest of .NET.

  • Source: .NET
